# Yoga Zeeburg

Yoga Zeeburg is a calm, down-to-earth yoga studio in Amsterdam East, by the water in Zeeburg / Cruquius. The studio is small and beginner-friendly, built around the idea that busy people don't need another random class — they need a weekly reset and a routine they can actually keep.

## Location

- Address: Cruquiusweg 96F, 1019 AH Amsterdam, Netherlands
- Neighbourhood: Amsterdam East (Zeeburg / Cruquius / Eastern Docklands)

## What the studio offers

- Small-group yoga classes for stress, tension, mobility and relaxation
- Class styles include Slow Flow & Soundbath, Restorative & Reiki & Aroma, Stress Release (Yin style), and other slow-restorative, balanced-mindful and active-strengthening classes
- Positioning: down-to-earth, beginner-friendly, focused on building a sustainable weekly routine — not fitness-hype or performative yoga

## Intro Pass

- 14 days unlimited yoga for €30
- New students only
- Stops automatically at the end of the 14 days (no auto-renewal, no cancellation needed)

## Booking and purchases

All bookings and membership purchases run through Sportbit, the studio's booking system. Members select "Yoga Zeeburg" inside Sportbit (which also hosts CrossFit Zeeburg schedules) before booking.
